coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 70%, 85-100 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10:48 at 70%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 48 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 70% for 10:48. 85-100 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 21:36 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 18% complete. Rep 2/5. 90% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 18% done. 3 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 54% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 21 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 32 minutes in. 95% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 54% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 54% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. 63% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 63% complete. Rep 4/5. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 4/5. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 95% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 5:24 at 95%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 5:24 at 95%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 95% × 5:24. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 48 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 48 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 48 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:48. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
